faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Stapleton homes?
faqs.answer: Stapleton residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in darker areas like basements and garages. Our spider control service targets all common species found in Staten Island homes and prevents future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to spider problems in Stapleton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Stapleton residents in most cases. Our team understands that spider infestations can be unsettling, so we prioritize quick response times throughout Staten Island to restore your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Is your spider control treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry after treatment.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 spider control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive spider control service includes a thorough inspection of your Stapleton property, interior and exterior treatment of affected areas, web removal, entry point sealing recommendations, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on your home's size and the severity of the infestation.
